original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of people with rosacea 2021
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United Kingdom; specialty guidance requiring UAE adaptation
original_registry_entry.population: Adults with clinician-assessed rosacea and people with perioral or periocular dermatitis described in the differential-diagnosis section; pediatric evidence is explicitly limited.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Primary care, dermatology, and ophthalmology-linked assessment where ocular symptoms are present.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for selected perioral and periocular morphology, distribution, symptom, exposure, and differential-documentation fields. The guideline does not cover diagnosis and is not used to generate medicines, treatment, referral, or urgency.

exact_sections.heading: Recommendations R3–R4 and background — clinical signs, symptoms, distribution, and ocular context
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports clinician documentation of facial distribution, erythema, papules or pustules, flushing, burning or stinging, dryness, edema, and ocular symptoms without inferring diagnosis.

exact_sections.heading: Section 5.9 — perioral and periocular dermatitis
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting abrupt or persistent perioral or periocular papules and pustules, redness, scale, lip-margin sparing, itch, burning, soreness, eyelid involvement, and topical, inhaled, or ophthalmic corticosteroid exposure without inferring cause.

title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of people with rosacea 2021
jurisdiction: United Kingdom; specialty guidance requiring UAE adaptation
population: Adults with clinician-assessed rosacea and people with perioral or periocular dermatitis described in the differential-diagnosis section; pediatric evidence is explicitly limited.
intended_setting: Primary care, dermatology, and ophthalmology-linked assessment where ocular symptoms are present.
access_limitations: Official host returned a challenge or shell page rather than guideline content.
